project_type: Greenfield React SPA - Bumble Account Maker Automation Panel
verification_instructions: Run `npm install && npm run dev` in /projects/sandbox/bumble. App should start on localhost:5173. Verify all 8 UI sections render. Run `npm run build` to confirm production build completes.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/bumble && npm install && npm run dev
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node v22.22.3, npm 11.4.2 available. Greenfield repo - no existing code. All source files go into /projects/sandbox/bumble.
contribution_requirements: Commit to branch feature/automation-panel. Push via GitHub power tool. Create PR to main.
key_patterns: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS v3 SPA. Dark theme with purple/pink accent colors. All automation logic is mocked/simulated. No real Bumble API calls.
directory_structure: Greenfield - will be created from scratch. Structure: src/components/, src/hooks/, src/utils/, src/types/, public/
